title: ZMM Meeting Summary
description: Schema for LLM-generated meeting summary output. The 'meeting' section is populated by zmm from filesystem metadata, not by the model. The model populates everything else.

meeting.description: Meeting metadata populated by zmm from directory names, filenames, and transcript headers. NOT generated by the model.

title.description: Original meeting title extracted from the raw directory or merged filename.

datetime.description: Meeting start datetime in 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS' format, extracted from directory name. Null if unknown.

duration.description: Estimated meeting duration in 'HH:MM:SS' format, computed from first/last transcript timestamps. Null if unknown.

source_path.description: Path to the transcript file that was summarized.

model_output.description: Content generated by the LLM. This is what the model returns.

improved_title.description: A clear, descriptive meeting title (max 80 chars). Should convey the meeting's primary purpose better than the original calendar/Zoom title. Example: 'Q3 Budget Finalization and Staffing Plan Review'

one_liner.description: A single sentence (max 200 chars) explaining what this meeting was about. Useful for search results and quick scanning. Example: 'Team reviewed Q3 budget proposals and agreed to hire two additional engineers by September.'

high_level_summary.description: A 2-4 sentence summary covering the meeting's main purpose, major topics discussed, important decisions made, and overall outcomes.

key_takeaways.description: 3-7 bullet points capturing the most important things someone should know if they only have 10 seconds. Include key decisions, critical action items, deadlines, and blockers.

decision.description: Clear statement of what was decided.

status.description: Whether the decision is confirmed or still tentative.

owner.description: Person responsible for this decision, or null if unclear.

confidence.description: How confident the model is that this was actually decided (not just discussed).

decisions.description: Decisions made during the meeting. Only include items the transcript clearly supports as decisions, not mere discussion.

task.description: Clear description of the task or action.

owner.description: Person responsible, or null if ownership is unclear.

requested_by.description: Person who assigned or requested this task, or null if unclear.

deadline.description: Deadline in YYYY-MM-DD format, or descriptive (e.g. 'end of week', 'before next meeting'), or null if none stated.

priority.description: Priority level if inferable from context, or null.

confidence.description: How confident the model is that this is a real committed action item.

action_items.description: Action items, tasks, and commitments. Include only items that someone clearly accepted or was assigned.

open_questions.description: Unresolved questions, pending decisions, items needing follow-up, and anything explicitly left open.

key_topics.description: Main topics, systems, projects, or themes discussed. Preserve specificity useful for later search and retrieval.

present.description: People clearly present in the meeting (spoke or were addressed).

mentioned.description: People mentioned but not clearly present.

uncertain.description: People whose presence is ambiguous due to transcript limitations.

attendees.description: Attendee information extracted from transcript speaker labels and references.

notes.description: Detailed notes for this topic including discussion points, technical details, rationale, dependencies, blockers, and concerns.

detailed_notes.description: Detailed meeting notes organized by topic. Include anything important for future reference that doesn't fit in the structured fields above.

assumptions.description: Assumptions the model made while generating this summary.

uncertain_corrections.description: Transcript corrections that are plausible but not certain.

uncertain_attribution.description: Speaker attributions that are uncertain due to transcript quality.

llm_notes.description: Transparency notes from the model about uncertainty, assumptions, and corrections applied.

metadata.description: Processing metadata populated by zmm after the model returns.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the summary was generated.

source_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the source transcript at time of summarization.

zmm_version.description: Version of zmm that generated this summary.
